---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new waste category, UI improvement, ALife mechanism, or other enhancement
title: "feat(<scope>): <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A one-paragraph description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, or what capability does it add?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed implementation approach. For Rust changes, include the affected module(s). For UI changes, include a sketch or mockup if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Phase Alignment

Which development phase does this belong to?

- [ ] Phase 1 — Terrain Visualization (current)
- [ ] Phase 2 — Physarum Particle Simulation
- [ ] Phase 3 — Proposal System
- [ ] Phase 4 — Learning Loop
- [ ] Phase 5 — ALife Sandbox
- [ ] Cross-cutting / tooling / docs

## Safety Impact (for classifier / scanner changes)

If your feature touches file classification or scanning:

- Does it risk producing false positives on protected categories (Documents, AppBundle, Database, git repos)?
- What evidence shows the new category is safe to classify as waste?

## Additional Context

Research references, related issues, screenshots, or anything else relevant.
